description: 20 - 16-01-2025 - Google Chat Message to Vincent Devine (Government Chief Security
text:
Officer, CO) from Junior Civil Servant

[16/01/2025, 15:33] JCS On Lord M - as mentioned on email they are waiting for a
bit more information from him so they (FCDO and our side) have collectively concluded that
they should move the date of the interview. MR thinks that is better than going ahead now and
having to come back to him again. The new date is acceptable to Lord M office, FCDO and
UKSV - so they are all aligned, though MR appreciates this is not an idea situ

Latest email on this topic is in to read

60
